## Privacy, security, and self-hosting

<!-- Describe changes to collected data, network egress, retention/deletion, secrets, permissions, SDK instrumentation, or external services. Write "No change" when applicable. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and documented where needed.
- [ ] Tests or other appropriate validation cover the change.
- [ ] Fixtures and evidence are synthetic or explicitly sanitized.
- [ ] The self-hosted path does not silently depend on a hosted Tacua service.
- [ ] Every commit includes a DCO `Signed-off-by` trailer.
- [ ] I have the right to contribute this work under Apache-2.0.
